projectDescription: A modular multi-bot management system for FiveM/GTA Roleplay Discord communities, featuring automated anti-spam, moderation, a professional ticket system, whitelist management, and a web dashboard with Discord OAuth2 authentication.
keyFeatures: Dual-bot architecture: Bot General + Bot Whitelist running independently via PM2
Automated anti-spam with role isolation, bulk-delete, and 7-day account age check
Intelligent moderation: /warn (auto-timeout at 3 warns), /kick, /unmute with role restore from DB
Professional ticket system with categories, claim/transfer/close, transcripts, and inactivity reminders
Whitelist management: /aprobar and /rechazar with embed notifications
Web dashboard with Discord OAuth2, Redis caching, and real-time KPIs
Multi-server support: per-guild settings stored in MariaDB via Prisma ORM
Full audit logging: message edits/deletes, role changes (with debounce), voice activity, bans
Canvas-based custom welcome cards with GTA-style font and neon avatar
Monitoring & alerting: /stats for CPU/RAM/uptime, configurable webhook alerts
publicApiSurface: /setup — Interactive wizard to configure channels, roles, and verification
/config — Master dashboard for viewing/editing guild configuration via SelectMenus
/warn @user reason — Warn user; auto-timeout at 3rd warning
/unmute @user — Lift sanction and restore all roles from DB
/kick @user reason — Kick with audit log entry
/stats — Real-time server stats (CPU, RAM, disk, DB latency)
/db-tables — Diagnostic: record counts per DB table
Web Dashboard: GET /api/metrics — System metrics (auth required)
Web Dashboard: GET /api/tickets — Ticket data and KPIs (auth required)
